    www/glpi: update to 10.0.17

    This is a patch release of www/glpi from 10.0.16 to 10.0.17.

    This is a security release (1 critical, 6 high severity, 5 moderate
    security fixes).

    Changelog: https://github.com/glpi-project/glpi/releases/tag/10.0.17

    PR:             283104
    MFH:            2024Q4
